theme: A Person Who Has Influenced You

sentences.english: Talk about a person who has had a significant influence on your life. Explain why this person has been important to you.
sentences.korean: 당신의 삶에 큰 영향을 준 사람에 대해 이야기하세요. 왜 그 사람이 중요한지 설명하세요.

sentences.english: The person who has influenced me the most is my high school science teacher, Mr. Kim.
sentences.korean: 저에게 가장 큰 영향을 준 사람은 고등학교 과학 선생님이신 김 선생님이에요.

sentences.english: Before his class, I thought science was just a collection of facts to memorize.
sentences.korean: 그의 수업 전에는, 과학이 그저 외워야 할 사실들의 모음이라고 생각했어요.

sentences.english: But he taught us to ask questions and think critically.
sentences.korean: 하지만 그분은 우리에게 질문하고 비판적으로 사고하는 법을 가르쳐주셨어요.

sentences.english: He would often say, "Don't accept anything unless you understand why it's true."
sentences.korean: 그분은 자주 말씀하셨어요, "왜 그것이 사실인지 이해하지 못하면 어떤 것도 받아들이지 마라."

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
A Skill You Want to Learn
Studying Alone vs. Studying in a Group

theme: A Person Who Has Influenced You

sentences.english: That mindset completely changed the way I approach learning — not just in science, but in everything.
sentences.korean: 그 사고방식은 제가 배움에 접근하는 방식을 완전히 바꿨어요 — 과학뿐 아니라, 모든 것에서요.

sentences.english: He also encouraged me personally when I was struggling with a difficult project.
sentences.korean: 또한 제가 어려운 프로젝트로 힘들어할 때 개인적으로 격려해주셨어요.

sentences.english: He stayed after school to help me, which showed me that he genuinely cared about his students.
sentences.korean: 방과 후에 남아서 도와주셨는데, 그분이 학생들을 진심으로 걱정한다는 것을 보여줬어요.

sentences.english: Because of him, I became interested in research and eventually chose to major in biology.
sentences.korean: 그분 덕분에, 연구에 관심을 갖게 되었고 결국 생물학을 전공하기로 했어요.

sentences.english: He shaped both my academic path and my way of thinking.
sentences.korean: 그분은 저의 학업 경로와 사고 방식 모두를 형성해주셨어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
